backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing clip management, user profiles, trending analytics, and access control with role-based permissions (admin/user/guest). Includes viral score calculation, clip similarity scoring, and auto-generated clip suggestions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the admin route protection enhancement that displays the authenticated user's principal ID in access denied messages for debugging purposes.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, hooks, and configuration files with detailed descriptions of their functionality and authentication/admin features.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with custom OKLCH color system variables for light and dark themes, including sidebar, chart, and UI component color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with page title 'Beast Clipping' and root div for React application mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application with TanStack Router setup, managing video playback and clip selection state. Includes admin route protection that displays authenticated user's principal ID with comprehensive debug logging when access is denied.
frontend/src/components/AdminErrorBounda: React error boundary component that catches and displays admin panel errors with retry functionality and navigation back to home page.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard component displaying system statistics (total clips, trending clips) and a detailed analytics table with loading states, error handling, and retry functionality.
frontend/src/components/ClipCard.tsx: Displays a single clip as a card with thumbnail, title, duration, viral score badge, and delete functionality with confirmation dialog. Supports selection state and click handling.
frontend/src/components/ClipList.tsx: Renders a scrollable list of saved clips using ClipCard components, with loading states, empty state messaging, and clip selection/deletion handlers.
Shows either AI-generated clip suggestions or trending clips with viral scores, allowing users to select suggestions to populate the clip creation form.
frontend/src/components/ClipTimestampCon: Form component for creating clips with title input and start/end timestamp controls (minutes/seconds), supporting both manual entry and pre-populated suggestions from selected or AI-generated clips.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout with header containing branding, Internet Identity authentication button, and conditional admin panel link for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/VideoUrlForm.tsx: Form for entering YouTube URLs with validation, video loading, and AI clip generation trigger button that passes generated clips to parent component.
Badge component displaying viral score percentage with color-coded styling and icons (flame/trending/sparkles) based on score thresholds (80+/50+/below 50).
frontend/src/components/YouTubePlayer.ts: React component that renders a responsive YouTube video player embedded in a Card component using an iframe with a 16:9 aspect ratio.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that manages the backend actor instance with authentication, initializing it with Internet Identity credentials and admin token, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Custom hook that fetches admin statistics including total clips count and trending clips analytics from the backend actor.
Custom hook that provides AI-powered clip generation functionality, currently using mock suggestions with viral scores but designed to integrate with real AI services in the future.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipCreation.ts: Custom hook that handles clip creation with viral score calculation based on duration and title characteristics, then saves the clip via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useClips.ts: Custom hook that fetches all clips from the backend and provides clip deletion functionality with loading state management.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipTimestamps.ts: Custom hook that manages start and end timestamps for video clips with validation, formatting, and conversion utilities between minutes/seconds and total seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts: Custom hook that checks if the current authenticated user is an admin by calling the backend's isCallerAdmin method with extensive debug logging.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrendingClips.ts: Custom hook that fetches trending clips from the backend actor using React Query.
Custom hook that provides YouTube URL validation and video ID extraction utilities using regex patterns.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme color schemes including primary, secondary, accent, and chart colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration for parameter persistence across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, container settings, border radius variables, custom animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document for a YouTube video clipping application called 'Beast Clipping', listing completed features, known issues (including admin panel access denial for authenticated owner), and architectural notes.
